Music
Live Shows
YoYo Sitar — Solo Afro-Desi Raga Voice Sound Journey
About Contact Press Kit

Solo Sitar

An intimate solo performance rooted in Indian raga, unfolding with space, depth, and spontaneous storytelling.

A contemporary solo sitar concert rooted in Indian raga and live improvisation — a journey that moves from deep stillness to driving rhythmic intensity.

What it is

  • Pure sitar performance with spacious alap, melodic development, and rhythmic build
  • A listening experience that can also lift into groove (depending on the venue and context)

Formats

  • Solo
  • Duo (with tabla / percussion)
  • Festival ensemble (expanded, on request)

Best for

Concert halls · Cultural centers · Festivals · Intimate venues · Private events

Duration

45 / 60 / 75 minutes (flexible)

Technical

Simple setup: stereo DI or 1–2 line inputs. Full tech rider available on request.

Check availability / Book

﻿
